feature.name: Navigation API: expose destination in navigation.transition
feature.creator: nrosenthal@chromium.org
feature.summary:
Currently NavigationTransition has a "from" property, exposing the old URL of the navigation. Exposing "to" (a NavigationDestination) completes this. It is especially useful when using precommit handlers, as during precommit the current URL has not yet switched to the destination.

Note that navigation.transition is only exposed for intercepted navigations - which means same-origin document-initiated navigations.

Exposing "to" (a NavigationDestination) completes this. It is especially useful when using precommit handlers, as during precommit the current URL has not yet switched to the destination.

Note that navigation.transition is only exposed for intercepted navigations - which means same-origin document-initiated navigations. Category: Miscellaneous. Blink component: UI>Browser>Navigation. Stars: 82.
